name: Oriental Meatball Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 Green peppers, cut into 1/2 inch squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine eggs and milk in a bowl. Stir in bread crumbs, onion salt, and 1/8 teaspoon pepper.
2. Add ground beef and mix well until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
3. Shape the mixture into 3-inch meatballs.
4. In a large skillet, cook meatballs in peanut oil over medium heat for about ten minutes or until cooked through, turning frequently.
5. Drain the pineapple, reserving the juice.
6. Add water to the reserved juice to make 3/4 cup liquid.
7. Combine pineapple chunks, green pepper, carrot, and celery with the meatballs; set aside.
8. In a small saucepan, combine brown sugar and corn starch. Stir in the pineapple liquid, white wine, vinegar, and soy sauce until thickened and bubbly.
9. Pour the hot mixture over the meatball mixture.
10. Cover and chill for at least 2 hours.
11. To serve, carefully stir tomato wedges into the meatball mixture or reserve the tomato wedges and arrange them along the edges of plates.
12. Place shredded lettuce on individual plates; spoon the meatball mixture on top.
